title: juncus triceps var. koreanus
intro: Juncus triceps var. koreanus, also known as Korean rush or Korean three-angle rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the genus Juncus, a group of plants commonly known as rushes. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Juncus triceps var. koreanus include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce swelling and pain, and support kidney function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
